prompt: Create a Textual Graphics typography design featuring a large letter or word within the outline shape from the reference image, using the red and white stripes as a dynamic background element.
prompt_refined: Generate a textual graphics typography design. The primary visual element is a background composed of vertical red and white stripes, consistent with the hand-painted, slightly uneven style seen in image 1. Centrally superimposed on this striped background, include a wobbly, hand-drawn speech bubble outline, mirroring the shape and placement of the black outline from image 1. Within this speech bubble outline, prominently feature a large, bold single letter or a short word, rendered in a high-contrast color such as black, filling the interior space of the bubble in place of the heart shown in image 1.
objects: Vertical red and white stripes on the background
Large, bold single letter or short word
